task: Site Header Navigation — Authenticated app header rewrite (nav tabs + bell + avatar) + 2 static mock pages + i18n
acceptanceCriteria: FR-001: Nav tabs + bell + avatar render iff authenticated; render nothing when unauthenticated
FR-002: Active tab shows gold text + underline + aria-current='page'; inactive tabs white text
FR-006: Bell is decorative, non-interactive (no button role, no tab stop, no aria-label)
FR-007: Avatar link navigates to signed-in user's OWN /profile/{id}, not another user's
FR-008: Language switcher persists and functional in both auth states
No regression: /login header unchanged (logo + language switcher only)
All strings localized: en.json + vi.json both updated with nav labels

highRisk: e2e/login.spec.ts — shared header chrome; must verify no accessible-name collision with new nav links
e2e/kudos.spec.ts — shared header chrome; must verify compose form selectors don't collide with new nav
e2e/kudos-live-board.spec.ts — shared header chrome; must verify live board queries unaffected
blastRadius.regressionScope: All existing unit + e2e suites must pass unmodified
